overview.title: What Is Ezconv YouTube MP4 Downloader?
overview.description: Ezconv is a free online tool designed specifically to help users download YouTube videos as MP4 for offline viewing. Unlike audio converters, the MP4 format keeps both video and sound, making it ideal for tutorials, presentations, music videos, and long-form YouTube content. You can return to the Ezconv homepage to access all YouTube download tools.

howTo.title: How to Download YouTube MP4 Videos with Ezconv

steps.title: Download
steps.description: Download the video as MP4 in seconds.

whatCanDownload.title: What Can You Download as MP4 with Ezconv?

sections.title: YouTube Videos (MP4)
sections.description: Download YouTube videos as MP4 to keep the full visual experience. This option is ideal for tutorials, vlogs, music videos, and educational content that relies on video visuals.

sections.title: HD & 4K YouTube Videos
sections.description: When supported by the original video, Ezconv lets you download YouTube MP4 videos in HD and 4K quality for crystal-clear playback on large screens.

sections.title: Long YouTube Videos
sections.description: Ezconv supports downloading long YouTube videos as MP4 without duration limits, making it suitable for podcasts, documentaries, and full courses.

whyDownload.title: Why Download YouTube Videos as MP4?
whyDownload.description: MP4 is the most widely supported video format across devices and platforms. By choosing MP4, you can watch downloaded YouTube videos offline without compatibility issues. This format is perfect for users who want to save full videos instead of just audio.

qualityOptions.title: MP4 Video Quality & Long Video Support
qualityOptions.description: Ezconv allows you to download YouTube MP4 videos in multiple resolutions, including HD and 4K quality when available. The tool also supports long YouTube videos, such as full-length tutorials, lectures, and extended content, without time limits or restrictions.

items.question: What is the difference between YouTube MP4 and MP3?
items.answer: MP4 includes both video and audio, while MP3 only extracts sound. MP4 is better for offline viewing and visual content.

items.question: Can I download YouTube MP4 videos online?
items.answer: Yes. Ezconv works entirely online, allowing you to download YouTube MP4 videos directly in your browser.

items.question: Does Ezconv support HD and 4K MP4 downloads?
items.answer: Yes. Ezconv supports HD and 4K MP4 downloads when the original YouTube video is available in those resolutions.

items.question: Can I download long YouTube videos as MP4?
items.answer: Yes. Ezconv supports downloading long YouTube videos without time limits.

items.question: Is Ezconv free to use?
items.answer: Yes. Ezconv is completely free and does not require registration.

items.question: Can I use Ezconv on mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes. Ezconv works on both desktop and mobile browsers, including Android and iOS.
